HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT JUAN ESCOBAR'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. JUAN ANTONIO ESCOBAR HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL FEES AND COSTS SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. calendar.matters:
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Denied

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
Off Calendar May-02-2007 Denied

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-30-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia Abalos.
Sally Morin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Ken Lee, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Juan Antonio Escobar.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1624 Keith St., #A, San Francisco.
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Back Rent and Damages $4,725.00, no costs or fees.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR WED, APR-25-2007: JAMES MILLAR, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF; THERE IS NO APPEARANCE BY OR FOR DEFENDANT JUAN ANTONIO ESCOBAR.

THE MATTER IS ORDERED OFF THE D-218 SETT. CONF. CALENDAR; TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

COMMISSIONER SUE KAPLAN; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D218).
